title: A Girl Doctor
description: At family dinner, Kid-3 proudly announces that she wants to be a doctor like Mom, then gives an innocent and very literal answer when Pa asks what kind.
alt: The family sits around the dinner table during a cozy evening meal. Kid-3 smiles proudly and says she wants to be a doctor like Mom. Pa asks what kind of doctor she wants to be, and Kid-3 replies, 'A girl doctor,' while Mom looks amused, Grandma Kelly looks delighted, Kid-2 tries not to laugh, and Kid-1 rolls her eyes.
